case_title: WINDELER LLC VS. MARK WILKES ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAVID P. WASSERMAN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINDELER LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WINDELER LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILKES, MARK AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 424 ELLIS STREET, UNIT 508 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
